strategy: Clean-room behavioral reconstruction. GNU Autoconf is treated as a black-box oracle.
phase_label: Honest Assessment — 280/290 features implemented, 12/12 courts sealed. Prescan + template dispatch with --pure-m4 escape hatch.
oracle_fixtures: 10/12 courts sealed. 3/6 Layer0 byte-exact. 10000 oracle fuzz iterations (0% exact, 0 panics). 1084 Layer1 fixtures. 23/23 layer4 runtime pass. 14 Kani runtime.
performance: <100ms per call. 96x faster than GNU on minimal fixture.

surfaces.note: 4/4 versions, 32/32 binaries. 3/6 Layer0 byte-exact. Oracle fuzz: 0 panics.
8/8 binaries build and run. Cache integration. --pure-m4 flag added.
26 AS_* macros sealed. Shell portability. 113 tests.
45 core macros sealed. AC_INIT..AC_OUTPUT pipeline. 72 tests.
Prologue, option parsing, config.log/status. 14/14 shell tests pass.
All 7 languages with real compiler detection. Fortran 14, Erlang 7, Go 2, ObjC 2.
40 AC_FUNC_* delegate to AC_CHECK_FUNC. ~5 stubs. Structural divergence admitted.
11 AC_HEADER_* delegate to AC_CHECK_HEADER. 25 AC_TYPE_* delegate to AC_CHECK_TYPE. ~7 stubs.
30 tests. WarningCategory taxonomy, DiagnosticManager, include stack.

Runtime-tested on 5 distros (Ubuntu 24.04, Debian 13, Fedora 43, AlmaLinux 9.8, openSUSE Leap 16) under QEMU/KVM via cargo install: 27/27 fixtures survive (Tier1 23/23, Tier2 4/4) after the shebang-first fix. Receipts in reports/vm-survival-receipts/.

non_claims.reason: Current architecture uses prescan + template dispatch (NC.ADMIT.2). M4 output is collected but discarded. User-defined AC_DEFUN, m4_if-hidden, m4_include macros fail.
JSON-based cache (SHA256). Not GNU frozen format. Intentional divergence.
Permanent no-ops in safe Rust. --allow-syscmd flag enables compat bridge.
0/100 exact match. Structural divergence is admitted (NC.ADMIT.2). Layer 0 only.
JSON cache only. NOT real GNU trace format. Panel critical blocker.
Orchestrator stub. Does NOT replicate project discovery, recursion, aux file management.
English-only diagnostics. Message catalog with basic locale detection exists.
